## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commits subject (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.) under 72 chars
- [ ] `make ci` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated (aim for >=85% coverage on touched packages)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Behavioral parity with mainsail verified, or divergence documented in `ARCHITECTURE.md`
